title: Bayesian Inference Path
description: Build fluency in Bayesian Inference inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Variational Inference
steps.summary: A method for approximating complex probability distributions using simpler distributions. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Model Inference. It opens into Variational Inference Techniques and Variational Inference Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Approximate Bayesian Computation
steps.summary: Approximate Bayesian Computation belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Bayesian Network and Bayesian Networks. It opens into Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) and Approximate Bayesian Computation in RL.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Prior Probability
steps.summary: Prior Probability belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Compare it with Posterior Probability and Variational Inference.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Posterior Probability
steps.summary: Posterior Probability belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Compare it with Prior Probability and Variational Inference.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
